title: Coin Change — Minimum Coins
description: Given coin denominations and a target amount, find the minimum number of coins needed to make exactly that amount. You have unlimited coins of each denomination.
inputSpec: First line: n (number of denominations) and amount W. Second line: n coin values.
outputSpec: The minimum number of coins, or -1 if impossible.

botCodes.code:
n,W=map(int,input().split())
coins=list(map(int,input().split()))
dp=[float('inf')]*(W+1)
dp[0]=0
for i in range(1,W+1):
    for c in coins:
        if c<=i and dp[i-c]+1<dp[i]:dp[i]=dp[i-c]+1
print(-1 if dp[W]==float('inf') else dp[W])

let()=let n=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id and w=Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id in let c=Array.init n(fun _->Scanf.scanf" %d" Fun.id) in let inf=1000000 in let dp=Array.make(w+1)inf in dp.(0)<-0;for i=1 to w do Array.iter(fun ci->if ci<=i&&dp.(i-ci)+1<dp.(i)then dp.(i)<-dp.(i-ci)+1)c done;Printf.printf"%d\n"(if dp.(w)=inf then -1 else dp.(w))
